text: Kristin. Thank you to Melanie Sanders and Jim Kapp in production, the Macmillan sales team, the marketing team from Tor \(Rebecca Yeager—you’re a freaking rock star\), and the digital marketing team. So, yes, while the writing of a novel is solitary and lonely, as you can see, I’m not alone. I have good people behind me. That’s something I will always be thankful for. They make me a better writer. One more thing: to you, the reader. If you’ve made it this far, I hope you enjoyed the journey. Some of you might be new to me as an author. Others have been with me since the beginning. I cherish each and every one of you, because without you, I would have no one to tell my stories to. Thanks for allowing me to do what I love most. *TJ Klune* *August 22, 2019* **ABOUT THE AUTHOR** TJ KLUNE is a Lambda Literary Award–winning author and a former claims examiner for an insurance company. His novels include *The House in the Cerulean Sea* and *The Extraordinaries*. Being queer himself, TJ believes it’s important—now more than ever—to have accurate, positive queer representation in stories. Visit him online at www.tjklunebooks.com, or sign up for email updates here. Instagram: @tjklunebooks Twitter: @tjklune Goodreads: T.J.
